applicationinsights.application.windowse.Description: The levels of event to log. You must specify each level to log. Possible values include `INFORMATION`, `WARNING`, `ERROR`, `CRITICAL`, and `VERBOSE`. This field is required for each type of Windows Event to log.

The type of Windows Events to log, equivalent to the Windows Event log channel name. For example, System, Security, CustomEventName, and so on. This field is required for each type of Windows event to log.
The CloudWatch log group name to be associated with the monitored log.
